query:
INSERT INTO citizenDelegates (userId, ministryId, delegateId, delegateUserId, votingMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1,
  m.id,
  NULL,
  CASE WHEN RAND() < 0.5 THEN FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1 ELSE NULL END,
  CASE WHEN RAND() < 0.3 THEN 'direct' ELSE 'citizen' END,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM ministries m
CROSS JOIN (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3) x
LIMIT 100
